description: Style NoteEvery item of clothing requires a different kind of innerwear to give the best comfort and the right look. enamor specialises in customised innerwear which will ensure a good overall look for you and lasting comfort throughout the day. And no need to compromise on the trendy look and style of your innerwear either, Enamor is your go to brand for the innerwear that takes care of all your requirements. Product DetailsGrey brassiere with pink lace detailing on the cups, has a pointelle knit fabric, adjustable straps, adjustable double hook and eye clasp at the back, underwired for support, medium coverage and a plunging necklineMaterial and CareFabric: 100% cottonFoam: 100% polyesterLace 92% nylon and 8% spandexHand washDo not iron or bleachDrip dry Owing to intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
